word.definition: A bibelot is a small household ornament or decorative object.

sports_fact.text: On July 16, 1950, Uruguay silenced roughly 200,000 fans at the Maracanã by beating Brazil 2-1 in the World Cup's deciding match — the 'Maracanazo,' still soccer's greatest upset.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Set to Open Lower as Chip Stocks Come Under Pressure

quote.text: I am myself, though from moment to moment something else seems to be looking on. Whatever will be required of me, however, can best be done if I remember who I am.
quote.author: Sheri S. Tepper

history.text: Following token resistance, the city of Nazareth, revered by Christians as the hometown of Jesus, capitulates to Israeli troops during Operation Dekel in the 1948 Arab–Israeli War.
